feedback.subtitle: What Our Clients Say
feedback.title: Trusted by delivery businesses across the region
feedback.description: Hear from merchants, logistics companies, and fleet operators who transformed their operations with Trasealio.
feedback.member1Quote: Trasealio transformed our entire delivery operation. We went from scattered spreadsheets and phone calls to a unified command center. Our dispatch team now handles 3x the volume with complete visibility over every driver and every delivery.
feedback.member2Quote: The merchant self-service portal alone saved us dozens of support hours per week. Our merchants can now create shipments, print labels, and track their orders without calling us. Trasealio made us a true multi-merchant platform.
feedback.member3Quote: Route optimization was a game-changer. We reduced fuel costs by 22% and failed deliveries by 35% in the first month. The driver app is intuitive and our team adopted it immediately — no training needed.
feedback.member4Quote: Finally, a delivery platform that understands finance. COD settlement, automated invoicing, wallet management — Trasealio doesn't stop at delivered. It continues through paid, settled, reconciled, and reported. Exactly what we needed.

whyTrasealio.subtitle: WHY TRASEALIO?
whyTrasealio.title: One platform. Every stakeholder. Complete control.

merchantPortal.title: Merchant Portal
merchantPortal.subtitle: Give every merchant a self-service dashboard to manage shipments, invoices, labels, and settlements — no ops team needed.
merchantPortal.overviewText: The Merchant Portal is the front door of Trasealio. Merchants sign in, create single or bulk shipments via CSV upload, print branded shipping labels, and track every order in real time. The portal surfaces COD summaries, invoice history, and payment reconciliation so merchants always know where their money is. With role-based access control, a merchant can invite team members while keeping sensitive financial data locked down. The result: fewer support tickets, faster onboarding, and happier merchants.

highlights.item1: Create shipments one-by-one or bulk-upload via CSV in seconds
highlights.item2: Auto-generate branded shipping labels with barcode & QR
highlights.item3: Real-time order tracking with full status timeline
highlights.item4: COD collection summaries with daily & weekly breakdowns
highlights.item5: Invoice management and downloadable financial reports
highlights.item6: Role-based access — owner, admin, and viewer permissions

useCases.item1: E-commerce stores managing 50+ daily shipments that need a single pane of glass for logistics
useCases.item2: Marketplace sellers who want branded tracking pages and label printing without developer help
useCases.item3: Finance teams that need accurate COD and invoice reconciliation every settlement cycle
useCases.item4: Operations managers onboarding new merchants in under 5 minutes with CSV import

merchantPortal.ctaText: Let them manage shipments, track orders, and reconcile payments — all on their own.

dispatchCenter.title: Dispatch Command Center
dispatchCenter.subtitle: A real-time operations hub where dispatchers assign drivers, manage workloads, and monitor every delivery on a live map.
dispatchCenter.overviewText: The Dispatch Command Center is mission control for your delivery fleet. Dispatchers see every active order, every available driver, and every zone on one screen. Drag-and-drop assignment, auto-dispatch rules, and workload balancing ensure no driver is overloaded and no order is missed. The live map shows driver positions, ETAs, and delivery progress in real time. Timeline views reveal bottlenecks before they become problems, and instant alerts keep the team ahead of exceptions. Whether you run 10 drivers or 10,000, the command center scales with you.

highlights.item1: Live map with real-time driver positions, ETAs, and delivery status
highlights.item2: Drag-and-drop order assignment and auto-dispatch rules
highlights.item3: Workload balancing across drivers and delivery zones
highlights.item4: Pickup and delivery sequence management with timeline view
highlights.item5: Instant exception alerts for delays, failures, and no-shows
highlights.item6: Zone-based filtering and multi-hub operations support

useCases.item1: Dispatch teams coordinating 200+ deliveries per shift across multiple zones
useCases.item2: Fleet managers who need visibility into driver utilization and idle time
useCases.item3: Operations leads identifying bottlenecks and reallocating resources in real time
useCases.item4: Multi-hub businesses that need zone-specific dispatch and unified reporting

dispatchCenter.ctaText: See your entire fleet, assign orders in seconds, and resolve issues before customers notice.

routeOptimization.title: Route Optimization
routeOptimization.subtitle: Intelligent stop sequencing that cuts drive time, saves fuel, and gets every package delivered faster.
routeOptimization.overviewText: Route Optimization in Trasealio goes beyond simple shortest-path calculation. The engine considers delivery windows, vehicle capacity, traffic patterns, and driver history to build the most efficient sequence of stops. Dispatchers see a before-and-after comparison showing time and distance saved. Once approved, the optimized route is pushed directly to the driver app with turn-by-turn next-stop guidance and one-tap navigation to Google Maps or Waze. Route plans are persisted, so you can audit performance and continuously improve. The result: fewer kilometers driven, lower fuel costs, and more deliveries per shift.

highlights.item1: Multi-constraint optimization — time windows, capacity, traffic, and priority
highlights.item2: Before / after comparison showing saved time and distance
highlights.item3: One-tap handoff to Google Maps or Waze for navigation
highlights.item4: Persisted route plans for auditing and continuous improvement
highlights.item5: Driver next-stop guidance with ETA and delivery instructions
highlights.item6: Re-optimization on the fly when orders are added or cancelled

useCases.item1: Delivery fleets looking to reduce fuel costs by 15-25% through smarter sequencing
useCases.item2: Drivers who want clear next-stop directions instead of guessing the best order
useCases.item3: Operations teams managing time-sensitive deliveries with strict delivery windows
useCases.item4: Companies scaling from one city to many that need repeatable, auditable route plans

routeOptimization.ctaText: Cut distances, reduce fuel spend, and hit every delivery window — automatically.
